title: Sources: Griffin, Pirates agree on 9 years, $140M
content: Rookie shortstop Konnor Griffin and the Pirates are in agreement on a nine-year extension, locking up the top prospect in baseball less than a week after his major league debut.

title: Mavs dispute claim they erred with Reaves' MRI
content: The Mavericks disputed Lakers coach JJ Redick's claim that their medical team examined the wrong part of Austin Reaves' body when the guard received an MRI by Dallas' staff.

title: Geno apologizes to Staley, says 'I lost myself'
content: UConn Huskies coach Geno Auriemma said in a statement Tuesday night that he lost himself with his behavior toward South Carolina coach Dawn Staley during his team's Final Four defeat last Friday.

title: Soler, Lopez trade haymakers, ejected in brawl
content: Angels designated hitter Jorge Soler charged the mound after Braves starter Reynaldo Lopez threw a high inside pitch, as both players threw punches amid a bench-clearing brawl in the fifth inning of Tuesday's game.

title: Redick downplays sideline quarrel with Vanderbilt
content: Lakers coach JJ Redick subbed forward Jarred Vanderbilt out of early in the second quarter, leading to a heated exchange between the two that Redick described as a "normal interaction" for him.

title: Medvedev mangles racket during 6-0, 6-0 loss
content: Former No. 1 Daniil Medvedev lost his temper, smashed his racket on the red clay court seven successive times and deposited the mangled frame in a trash bin midway through a 6-0, 6-0 loss to Matteo Berrettini at the Monte Carlo Masters.

title: NBA vet Malone sees 'special' opportunity at UNC
content: New Tar Heels coach Michael Malone called North Carolina the only college job he would've accepted, saying he recognizes he has a "chance to be a part of something special" there.

title: Reinsdorf: Next Bulls GM must be sold on Donovan
content: Bulls CEO and president Michael Reinsdorf, who is looking for a new head of basketball operations after firing Arturas Karnisovas earlier this week, said Tuesday that retaining Billy Donovan as head coach would be a major requirement.

title: 🏈 Schrager's first-round NFL mock draft
content: Peter Schrager leans on his intel after last week's annual league meeting to project picks in the NFL draft. Here's where things stand right now in Round 1.

title: Predicting which NFL teams will draft quarterbacks: Nine perfect fits across seven rounds
content: Ben Solak projects landing spots for the nine QBs he considers draftable in the 2026 class (and one trade) and sizes up each team fit.

title: 2026 Masters: Experts' picks and betting tips
content: Who do our experts think will win? Where does our betting expert believe there's value? We break it all down.

title: Our hottest hot takes two weeks into the MLB season
content: From a shocking NL East champion to a 50-homer slugger you probably haven't heard of yet, our experts go bold with their early predictions.

title: The art of taking a lead: Why every step matters in baseball's game of inches
content: A bad lead helped keep the Blue Jays from a title. Tim Kurkjian explores the state of a critical skill.

title: 'It's painful but worthwhile': What players, coaches and execs are saying about the NBA's tanking problem
content: With tanking strategies growing in both audaciousness and frequency of use, can the league get its arms around the often-effective practice?

title: Free agency: Predictions, biggest questions, more

title: Divine intervention? How Dallas landed Dak Prescott at No. 135 in the 2016 NFL draft

content: Washington must string together some victories to get back to the playoffs. Plus, updated projections after Tuesday's 11 games.

content: There are no more friendlies or camps before the U.S. names its World Cup roster, so what does coach Mauricio Pochettino need to do before then?

content: The 2026 men's hoops champion has been crowned. We're rolling right into ranking next season's best teams -- with a few new rules.

content: Dive into how women's professional wrestling has evolved on WWE's biggest stage over the past 40 years.

title: Baseball in Latin America is broken -- is an international draft the answer?
content: As the search for the next Dominican baseball phenom intensifies, the tragic death of a teenager is the latest symptom of a failing system.

title: Inside the Bucks' lost season, and the looming 'nasty breakup' with Giannis Antetokounmpo
content: A difficult season exacerbated a 13-year relationship that was already on the rocks, leading to more questions than answers in Milwaukee.

title: PGA Tour vs. LIV in a much different place than it was at 2023 Masters
content: It's been three years, and while the LIV-PGA fight isn't necessarily 'won,' it certainly seems settled.

title: Michigan's championship punctuated Dusty May's homecoming in a full family affair
content: Just two seasons after arriving in Ann Arbor, May returned to his home state of Indiana to cut down the nets.

title: 'I started to love basketball again': How Michigan built a champion on fun and freedom
content: In the year of the freshman, Dusty May led a band of transfers and upperclassmen to a national title.

content: Looking beyond the numbers, here are the teams that took the boldest steps in their portal approaches.

title: Ranking the top 20 men's basketball players to enter the transfer portal
content: More than 1,000 players have entered the portal less than 24 hours after it opened. Here's the top talent.

title: Six things I wish I'd known when I drafted
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft takes a look at biggest fantasy surprises from the first few weeks of the season.

title: Prospect watch: Konnor Griffin's here, who's next?
content: All the prospects fantasy managers should be keeping an eye on as the season moves through its first month.

title: Big questions for the rest of the softball season
content: Is NiJaree Canady still dominant? Which teams are serious contenders? Bill Connelly dives into the 2026 college softball season thus far.

title: Women's boxing pound-for-pound rankings: Two fighters make their top-10 debut
content: Two fighters break into the top 10 after standout performances. Here are the latest women's pound-for-pound rankings.

title: Men's divisional rankings: Why Wilder's win wasn't enough to join top 10 at heavyweight
content: The Deontay Wilder-Derek Chisora fight card caused a major shakeup, but not in the division you would think.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: San Diego leads the way, Washington back on track
content: San Diego Wave are the new leaders of the ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, while the Washington Spirit are soaring up.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Barcelona eye Italy defender
content: Liverpool and Barcelona are lining up a move to sign Atalanta and Italy international right back Marco Palestra. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Opinion: Analysis: BJP And Left, Ideologically Diverse, Has Same Set Of Voters
content: Clearly, the Left and the BJP though ideologically diverse end up cultivating the same set of voters, and their growth is complementary across the states

title: Iran Warns Ships In Hormuz Without Permission Will Be "Destroyed": Report
content: The message comes after US President Donald Trump said that he has agreed to suspend attacks on the Islamic Republic for two weeks only if the strait is opened in a "complete, immediate, and safe" manner.

title: Puducherry Set To Go To Polls Tomorrow With High-Profile Face-Off In 2 Seats
content: Political disputes have intensified throughout the Union Territory, but the elections in Thattanchavady and Lawspet are gaining attention.

title: "Hardest War To Solve": JD Vance On Russia-Ukraine Conflict
content: Kyiv on Wednesday called on the United States to pressure Russia into ending its invasion of Ukraine.

title: Dispur, Jorhat Become High-Stakes Battlegrounds Ahead Of Assam Polls
content: Dispur and Jorhat are among the most-watched seats in the Assam Assembly elections, with defections, proxy wars and high-profile rivalries shaping the battles.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The 'Munir Doctrine' That Drove Pak's US-Iran Brokering Project
content: The spate of calls, social media messaging, and diplomatic efforts from Pakistan in recent weeks, especially involving PM Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir, raises many questions.

title: Dibrugarh Sets Up 300 All-Women Polling Stations, Highest In Assam
content: Officials stated that these polling stations will be fully managed by women, including presiding officers and polling officials, reflecting the growing confidence and active involvement of women in election management.

title: Trapped At Sea, Caught In War: 28-Year-Old Indian Seafarer's Ordeal In Iraq
content: After nearly six months of uncertainty, fear, and survival at sea, 28-year-old seafarer Rex Pereira is finally back home. But what he brings with him is not just relief; it's a harrowing account of exploitation, abandonment, and being caught in the m

title: India Not In Favour Of Tolls For Passage Through Hormuz: Sources
content: Iran's ability to control the Strait of Hormuz since the war began on February 28 proved a tremendous strategic advantage.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live: Trump Announces 50% Tariffs On Nations Supplying Iran With Weapons
content: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:  US President Donald Trump agreed to a two-day ceasefire just hours before the deadline he had set for Iran to capitulate, warning that otherwise a "whole civilisation will die tonight."

title: Opinion: Opinion | War Ally To Mere Bystander: Is This The Loneliest Day For Netanyahu?
content: Israel, the US's closest partner in the region and which lured Trump to take on Iran, was ultimatelt a mere spectator to the ceasefire agreement.

title: Designer Riyaz Gangji Faces Non-Bailable Warrant Over Alleged Default
content: The order against fashion designer Riyaz Gangji came in a contempt petition arising from an alleged Rs 5 crore default involving a Ludhiana-based real estate company

title: Vance Reveals How An "Impatient" Trump Wants To Move In Talks With Iran
content: US Vice President JD Vance, on his trip to Hungary, admitted that Trump showed interest in reaching an agreement with Iranians in good faith.

title: Woman's Body Found Stuffed Inside Bed Box In Delhi, 3 Arrested: Cops
content: The body of a 35-year-old woman with strangulation marks was found stuffed inside a double bed storage box at a paying guest (PG) accommodation in outer Delhi's Mangolpuri area, police said on Wednesday.

title: Man In Coma Since 2025, Wife Seeks Court Approval To Preserve His Sperm
content: Arjit Gaur, counsel for the petitioner, stated that the woman is requesting permission to preserve a sperm sample while it is still viable.

title: Schoolgirl Threatened With Video Leak, Allegedly Raped By 7 In UP Cafe
content: Deputy Superintendent of Police (North) Mukesh Chandra Mishra said the student was allegedly threatened with the circulation of a video of an earlier sexual assault.

title: Caretaker Slits Farmhouse Owner's Throat With Sickle In Gurugram: Cops
content: Police arrested a caretaker in Delhi on Tuesday for allegedly slitting the throat of a 35-year-old farmhouse owner here with a sickle.

title: 'Iran begged for this ceasefire': US war secretary Pete Hegseth hails 'victory' over Iran
content: US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth asserted that Iran "begged for ceasefire" following the "decimating" Operation Epic Fury, which rendered their military combat-ineffective. Hegseth credited President Trump for this moment and warned of forceful action to secure Iran's enriched uranium if necessary, signaling a continued hardline US stance.

title: 'Not good law': Centre questions adultery, same-sex relationship verdicts in SC
content: The government has informed the Supreme Court that landmark rulings decriminalizing adultery and same-sex relationships were based on subjective constitutional morality, deeming them "not a good law." Solicitor General Tushar Mehta argued that "constitutional morality" is vague and foreign legal reliance is concerning, questioning its role in judicial review and democratic lawmaking.

title: How Mojtaba Khamenei defused Trump's ultimatum and cleared path for US-Iran truce
content: A ceasefire has been declared between the United States and Iran after 38 days of war. US President Donald Trump agreed to halt military actions for two weeks. This development followed threats from Trump to destroy Iran's civilization if the Strait of Hormuz was not reopened. Both nations are claiming victory.

title: Anthropic CEO says AI will take your job;but his own company find enough people to work
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning that AI could eliminate more than 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs within five years. But inside his own company, the picture looks different. Claude Code creator Boris Cherny says the software engineer job title is already dying — and Anthropic's Head of Growth says they can't hire enough PMs to keep up. The disruption isn't coming. It's already here.

title: From obliterate to ceasefire: How Trump's Iran war strategy shifted hour by hour
content: A 39-day US-Israel war with Iran has entered a two-week ceasefire after escalating rapidly, causing thousands of deaths and widespread displacement. The conflict, initiated by coordinated strikes on Iranian leadership, expanded to disrupt global energy markets and shipping routes. President Trump's objectives and timelines shifted throughout the war, culminating in a fragile pause.

title: PSL team owner contradicts Naqvi on empty stands: Pakistan was...
content: Empty stadiums in PSL 2026 have sparked debate after Islamabad United owner Ali Naqvi linked the decision to Pakistan’s role in global peace efforts. His claim conflicts with PCB’s earlier explanation citing a fuel crisis. Critics say the situation is being overstated, arguing that logistical issues are being framed as a larger diplomatic sacrifice.

title: 'No uranium enrichment': Trump ties Iran ceasefire to nuclear curbs & tariffs
content: After a delicate two-week truce, President Trump announced a "strategic shift" in Tehran, highlighting enhanced US-Iran cooperation to dismantle nuclear arsenals. He revealed intentions for both sanctions relief and potential tariffs on countries that supply weaponry to Iran. This interim measure is designed to create room for expansive talks on nuclear limitations and regional stability.

title: Canada has changed immigration rules; changing visa fee, work permit rules and more
content: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting in April 2026 with increased passport and citizenship fees, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain more control over candidate assessment, and rural employers can hire more foreign workers. Saskatchewan introduces new application fees for its nominee program.

title: Carlsen vs Hans documentary: Is 'Untold: Chess Mates' worth watching?
content: Netflix’s "Untold: Chess Mates" revisits the 2022 controversy between Magnus Carlsen and Hans Niemann, sparked by Carlsen’s withdrawal after a shock defeat and the subsequent cheating allegations. The film examines Niemann’s lawsuit, claims of reputational harm, and tensions involving Chess.com’s business ties. Despite polished storytelling, it offers no new evidence, leaving both players standing by their positions.

title: Dhurandhar 2 BO day 21: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 1050 cr milestone
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge,' continues to script history at the global box office. On day 21, Wednesday, April 8, 2026, the Ranveer Singh-led thriller solidified its legendary status by becoming the first Hindi film ever to surpass the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone. Having already outpaced giants like 'Jawan' and 'KGF: Chapter 2', the film has now amassed a domestic net of Rs. 1,034.00 crore. Despite the ongoing IPL 2026 season, the film remains a powerhouse, eyeing a Rs. 1,700 crore worldwide gross target.

title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has a 'bold ask' for his engineers
content: Meta is aggressively pushing an AI-native vision, with CEO Mark Zuckerberg directing engineers to restructure codebases for AI agents. The company tracks employee AI usage, including massive token consumption costing millions monthly. Teams are reorganised into AI 'pods,' and ambitious goals are set for AI-assisted coding, though some question the focus on usage over actual productivity.

title: Paul Skenes’ girlfriend reveals getting rejected for HBO 'The White Lotus'
content: The former LSU gymnast and social media star Olivia Dunne has recently spoken about her first missed chance in Hollywood. The 23-year-old said she once auditioned for HBO’s popular show The White Lotus; however, she did not get the role. Even after this setback, Dunne stayed focused on acting. She has now secured an important role in the upcoming Baywatch reboot.

title: Yashasvi Jaiswal scripts history as RR star breaks multiple IPL records
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal's explosive 77 powered Rajasthan Royals to a 27-run victory over Mumbai Indians in a rain-shortened IPL 2026 clash. Jaiswal's innings, featuring 10 boundaries and four sixes, propelled RR to the top of the table. His century of sixes in the IPL is a remarkable feat, underscoring his destructive batting prowess and consistent performance for the franchise.

title: Samay Raina roasts Amitabh Bachchan, admits lying on KBC about grandmother
content: Samay Raina humorously addressed the India's Got Latent controversy in his stand-up special, Still Alive. He revealed the problematic question was asked multiple times by Ranveer Allahbadia, joking about removing most of it. While using comedy, Raina also shared his guilt over death threats to fellow creators and his family's distress, showcasing a candid and honest approach to the incident.

title: Did Trump’s 'Madman Theory' trick Tehran into a pause?
content: In a dramatic turn, President Trump declared a two-week ceasefire with Iran, averting a major escalation. Following days of intense threats and missile exchanges, the move reopened the Strait of Hormuz, calming global markets. Experts debate whether this is a strategic pause or a calculated application of the 'Madman Theory' to force negotiations.

title: 'Take this very seriously': Cricket Board on Warner's drink-driving case
content: Former Australia cricketer David Warner has been charged with drink driving in Sydney after allegedly recording a blood alcohol level of 0.104 during a random test. He will appear in court on May 7. Cricket NSW called the matter serious but pledged support. The incident may impact his reputation, though it is unlikely to affect his ongoing Pakistan Super League participation.

title: Investors richer by Rs 17L cr: Sensex rallies 2,900 points - top reasons for Bull Run
content: Stock market today: Buoyed by the two week US-Iran ceasefire, stock markets rallied strongly on Wednesday. While Nifty50 went above 24,000 intraday, BSE Sensex rose over 3,000 points.

title: Hidden charges? Gulf conflict may raise LPG prices, but not your restaurant bill, says CCPA
content: The Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) has declared additional restaurant charges like "LPG charges" or "fuel surcharge" unlawful, reinforcing price transparency. These operational costs must be factored into menu prices, not added later without explicit consumer consent. This intervention aims to dismantle unfair trade practices and restore trust in everyday transactions.

title: DC vs GT, IPL 2026: 5 players to watch in today’s match
content: Delhi Capitals, despite two wins, face top-order woes, relying on Sameer Rizvi's heroics. Gujarat Titans, conversely, falter in the middle order despite strong starts. Key players like Shubman Gill and KL Rahul are poised for impact, while bowlers T Natarajan and Ashok Sharma could be game-changers in this intriguing IPL clash.

title: Polls in Kerala, Assam, Puducherry tomorrow: Here's how to check your name in voter list
content: Voters in Kerala, Assam, and Puducherry can now verify their names on the electoral roll. The Election Commission offers online tools for easy checking. Voters can use their EPIC number or personal details. Registered mobile numbers also facilitate verification. Downloading the complete voter list for polling booths is also possible. This advance check helps streamline the voting process.

title: Sabarimala case: SC says legislature not 'last word' on what is religious superstition
content: A nine-judge Constitution bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant is examining the ambit of religious practices across faiths and the extent to which courts can intervene. At the outset, Solicitor General Tushar Mehta, appearing for the Centre, questioned how courts could assess whether a practice is superstitious.

title: SSC CGL Result 2025: Allocation list out, check cut-offs here
content: The Staff Selection Commission (HQ) has announced the first round of tentative allocation (FRTA) for Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination, 2025. Candidates who qualified Tier-II Paper-I (Sections I + II) and submitted option-cum-preferences are eligible for evaluation in Computer Knowledge Test (CKT) and Data Entry Speed Test (DEST). Cut-offs vary by category, and 107 results are withheld. A sliding mechanism will run from April 13–22, 2026, for vacancy reallocation. Final answer keys and detailed marks will be released on the SSC website.

title: 'Get lost' vs 'MPs were shouting': TMC, EC fight gets ugly after '7-min' meet with CEC
content: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) accused Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar of partisanship and corruption after a brief meeting. The party alleged their delegation was dismissed abruptly and that the EC had ignored nine letters from Mamata Banerjee. The TMC also presented evidence of alleged BJP links among Bengal officials, demanding their transfer.

title: Lottery king's wife richest in Tamil Nadu poll fray with Rs 1,049 crore assets
content: In a surprising twist in Tamil Nadu's assembly elections, Leema Rose Martin, the AIADMK candidate from Lalgudi and spouse of lottery tycoon Santiago Martin, has reported a staggering wealth of Rs 1,049.5 crore. This declaration positions her as the richest candidate in the race. Her financial disclosures include hefty investments in real estate, gaming ventures, and the hospitality industry.

title: ‘Raaka’ First Look Poster: Atlee calls film an 18-year dream
content: Director Atlee expressed deep emotion following the reveal of Allu Arjun's 'Raaka' first look, calling it an 18-year-old dream. The poster, released on Arjun's birthday, has generated significant buzz, hinting at a rugged action thriller with a wild, tribal tone. With Deepika Padukone also confirmed, expectations are soaring for this highly anticipated project.

title: UP districts bordering dry Bihar ‘high’ on liquor revenue; alcohol flows via river routes
content: Districts bordering Bihar are leading Uttar Pradesh in excise revenue, with some exceeding targets by over 100%. This surge is attributed to tipplers from the 'dry' state crossing over or engaging in bulk purchases for smuggling. Even economically weaker eastern UP districts are outperforming affluent western counterparts, highlighting a significant cross-border demand.

title: CSK star player reveals return date after injury - WATCH
content: Chennai Super Kings may soon welcome back Dewald Brevis, sidelined by a side strain. Head coach Stephen Fleming anticipates his return, potentially for the April 11 clash against Delhi Capitals. Brevis, retained for Rs 2.20 crore, expressed his eagerness to rejoin the team, stating, 'See you guys on the 11th… every match, everywhere we play.

title: Beer party during Ganga boat ride in Varanasi raises eyebrows
content: A boat decorator was arrested in Varanasi after a video of him drinking alcohol on the Ganga river surfaced online. This incident follows a previous viral video showing an iftar party's waste allegedly dumped into the river. Samajwadi Party president Akhilesh Yadav criticized the ruling BJP, linking increased alcohol consumption to citizen stress.

title: Stefon Diggs controversy grows as Cardi B fears for safety amid chaos
content: Cardi B has raised serious safety concerns, saying she feels her life is in danger amid ongoing online harassment linked to Stefon Diggs. The situation escalated after viral rumors and legal debates surfaced. Meanwhile, Offset was shot near a Florida casino but is recovering. With Diggs also facing legal issues, the controversy has intensified.

title: Jasprit Bumrah’s unwanted hat-trick: First time in 8 years, just fourth ever
content: Amid the Sooryavanshi-Jaiswal mayhem, Bumrah returned wicketless for the third consecutive match. A rarity in Bumrah’s illustrious T20 career. For Bumrah, this unwanted hat-trick of going wicketless for three matches in a row was in fact the first time in nearly 8 years and only the fourth time in his entire T20 career.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to MI next? Ex-India cricketer’s post sparks buzz
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is creating a stir, with a social media post hinting at a potential future with the Mumbai Indians. The 15-year-old prodigy has rewritten T20 records, becoming the youngest centurion and showcasing a fearless approach against top bowlers like Jasprit Bumrah.

title: Several children injured as school bus overturns in Meerut
content: A school bus from St. Mary's Academy overturned near the Kali river, injuring at least 10 children. Locals bravely rescued trapped students from the ditch. While most injuries are minor, parents are protesting, alleging the driver was intoxicated or using a phone. Police are investigating the driver's role and the bus's safety.

title: Bengal poll battle heats up: EC and TMC exchange 'straight talk'
content: The Election Commission of India has assured that the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections will be conducted without fear, violence, or intimidation. This statement follows a meeting with the TMC, which accused the ECI of bias towards the BJP and alleged systematic disenfranchisement of voters through electoral roll revisions.

title: Stealth, speed & sensor fusion: Why F-22 Raptor is the most lethal fighter jet ever built
content: The F-22 Raptor, a fifth-generation fighter, continues to dominate aerial combat with its stealth, speed, and advanced avionics. This US Air Force marvel excels in detecting and engaging threats before being seen, ensuring air superiority. Its unique combination of capabilities, including supercruise and exceptional maneuverability, makes it a formidable asset even against newer platforms.

title: First in 7 years! India to get Iran crude oil on US sanctions waiver
content: India, the world’s third-largest importer and consumer of oil, has not taken any shipments from Iran since May 2019, when US sanctions led it to halt such purchases.

title: 'Israel backs US ceasefire with Iran but not Hezbollah': What Netanyahu said on two-week truce
content: Israel backs President Trump's two-week pause on Iran strikes, provided Tehran reopens vital shipping lanes and halts regional attacks.  However, Prime Minister Netanyahu stressed this ceasefire explicitly excludes Lebanon, indicating continued operations on that front.  This stance contrasts with Iran's broader peace proposal, highlighting ongoing regional complexities and differing interpretations of the truce.

title: Andhra Pradesh goes the whole hog on scientific waste management
content: In line with its circular economy policy, the government plans to set up 107 new waste processing centres with an outlay of ₹528 crore, besides establishing six waste-to-energy plants, says Swachh Andhra Corporation Chairman Pattabhi Ram

title: The Hindu to organise webinar on biotech for sustainable agriculture
content: The discussion will focus on the role of biotechnology in sustainable and efficient agricultural systems, innovations in crop improvement, soil and plant health, and climate-adaptive farming practices

title: Kerala Assembly election 2026: Pala goes to polls on K. M. Mani’s death anniversary
content: Jose K. Mani, son of the late KC(M) founder and LDF candidate in Pala, along with his family members will offer prayers at Mani’s tomb at the Cathedral Church in Pala, before heading to the polling booths

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Silent campaign day in Adoor erupts into leaflet controversy, protests and arrests
content: 5 CPI workers arrested and later released for distributing leaflets defaming UDF candidate C.V. Shanthakumar

title: Congress leader expelled from party for allegations against KPCC chief
content: Former Minority Congress district president said Sunny Joseph had orchestrated a conspiracy against senior leader K. Sudhakaran

title: Railway underpass near Kukkarahalli lake to begin in 15 days: MP
content: Trees affected by the construction will be translocated using the technology available with NHAI, says Yaduveer Wadiyar

title: KKCCI seeks special focus on Kalyana Karnataka in proposed MSMEs Policy
content: The Kalyana Karnataka Chamber of Commerce and Industry submits a comprehensive memorandum to the State government

title: Here are the big stories from Karnataka today
content: Welcome to the Karnataka Today newsletter, your guide from The Hindu on the major news stories to follow today. Curated and written by Nalme Nachiyar.

title: Rollback of tab-based mark entry system in SSC spot valuation sought
content: Frequent network failures and persistent technical glitches are delaying the valuation process, says MLC

title: LPG supply normalises, delivery within 3-4 days: Bihar government
content: Urges consumers to shift to PNG connections; says commercial gas cylinders will be made available to needy persons on equitable basis for weddings

title: Forest officials intensify fire prevention efforts in Chittoor, Annamayya districts
content: They identify multiple zones vulnerable to forest fires as temperatures cross 45° C in the summer months; creation of fire lines, removal of dry biomass, and deployment of fire watchers in sensitive beats have been taken up, says Madanapalle Forest Range Officer

title: Ensure hospitals accept Ayushman cards, says BJP State president Madhav
content: The BJP leader urges the government to issue clear and binding guidelines to this effect to ensure senior citizens receive timely healthcare without inconvenience

title: Centre approves Jaipur Metro Project Phase-2 costing over ₹13,000 crore
content: The Phase-2 corridor will provide seamless connectivity to major activity nodes such as Sitapura Industrial Area, VKIA, Jaipur Airport, Tonk Road, SMS Hospital and Stadium, Ambabari and Vidhyadhar Nagar, an official statement said.

title: Panchamasali seer files complaint against woman, alleges blackmail and intimidation
content: The woman introduced herself as a Lingayat and sought the seer’s blessings and some donations. But soon began pestering him for money and even falsely accused him of indulging in improper conduct with her, the complaint alleges.

title: Bomb threat email to Bengaluru airport turns out to be hoax; case registered
content: The sender of the email, reportedly written in Tamil, claimed to be part of a group from Coimbatore wanting to take revenge against the DMK-led Tamil Nadu government for betraying them.

title: India welcomes Iran-U.S. ceasefire, stresses dialogue and diplomacy
content: Government calls for de-escalation and unimpeded navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, does not acknowledge Pakistan’s role in U.S.-Iran ceasefire talks

title: Over 150 fall ill after suspected food poisoning at temple feast in Mattannur in Kerala
content: Health authorities say a majority of patients were discharged after being administered fluids, but children and elderly persons continued to return with persistent symptoms

title: NSA invoked against suspected cattle smuggler in Odisha
content: At least 10 cases are pending against the accused, including charges of illegal cattle transportation and assault on public servants

title: Tweets by journalist Rana Ayyub derogatory, communal: Delhi High Court
content: Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav, who was hearing a lawyer's petition alleging that Ms. Ayyub's tweets insulted Hindu Deities and "revered historical figures", observed that even an FIR was also directed to be registered against her in relation to the tweets and called upon the Centre, Delhi Police and X to "work in tandem" and "do the needful in 24 hours".

title: CAG flags major violations in Visakhapatnam Rushikonda resort project, costs surge to ₹350 crore
content: CAG audit finds no Detailed Project Report, no judicial preview, and contract lapses in Rushikonda resort redevelopment; project cost rose from ₹164 crore to ₹350 crore under YSRCP

title: Sabarimala women entry case highlights: Supreme Court asks Centre if non-devotees of Lord Ayyappa can challenge customs of Sabarimala temple
content: The submission was heard by a nine-judge Constitution bench headed by the CJI on the petitions related to discrimination against women at religious places, including the Sabarimala temple in Kerala

title: Goa nightclub fire: ED attaches assets worth over ₹17 crore
content: The federal probe agency took action against the 'Birch by Romeo Lane' club under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA).

title: DMK, BJP alliances in shambles due to intense infighting: TVK chief Vijay
content: Mr. Vijay claimed that a section of the Congress party had been “purchased” by the DMK, while the “real Congress” was with the TVK, which was striving hard to save the secular fabric

title: Sattankulam custodial deaths: The chilling account of police head constable Revathi who spoke out against her colleagues
content: ‘He can withstand good beating; he is strong; looks like he eats a hundred idlis,’ said the cops about Benicks, according to Ms. Revathi’s statement

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Congress demands ECI to act over ‘money for votes’ allegations against Palakkad BJP candidate Sobha Surendran
content: In a video that went viral, alleged BJP workers are seen slipping a wad of currency notes in the hands of a senior citizen at Kannadi in Palakkad

title: M. Sai Kumar to be Tamil Nadu Chief Secretary; Sandeep Mittal to head Armed Police, DVAC
content: Meanwhile, official sources said that the incumbent Chief Secretary, N. Muruganandam, was relieved of his duties on Wednesday

title: West Asia conflict: India welcomes ceasefire between Iran and U.S.
content: We welcome the ceasefire reached and hope that it will lead to lasting peace in West Asia says Ministry of External Affairs

title: Veteran Congress leader Mohsina Kidwai passes away; tributes pour in
content: A senior leader of the Congress, Kidwai had a public career spanning more than six decades; after several terms in the Lok Sabha, she entered the Rajya Sabha in 2004 and remained active in public life well into her eighties

title: Andhra Pradesh liquor scam: High Court grants bail to main accused Raj Kesireddy
content: Andhra Pradesh High Court grants bail to Raj Kesireddy, main accused in ₹3,200 crore A.P. liquor scam, months after Supreme Court rejected his bail plea.

title: WNBA mock draft: There's a new projected No. 1
content: Olivia Miles drops 28 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists as TCU puts away Virginia 79-69 . the college players available in Monday's draft had one last audition in the tournament . in our latest WNBA mock draft, for example, Miles projected as a lottery pick last season when she was eligible age-wise .

title: Frozen Four: How Denver, Michigan, Wisconsin and North Dakota can win it all
content: the 2026 men's Frozen Four is set, with Michigan and Denver joining North Dakota and Wisconsin in the field bound for Las Vegas to play for the national championship . the Pioneers avenged last season's loss to Western Michigan with a 6-2 win over the defending national champs to win the Loveland Regional .

title: Women's transfer rankings for 2026-27 season
content: the women's college basketball transfer portal officially opened Monday . by day's end more than 1,000 players had entered the portal . new regulations this year prevented any official activity until after the season concluded Sunday . the transfer portal window is also shorter this year, closing on April 20 .

title: NBA Power Rankings: Where all 30 teams land
content: the end of the 2025-26 regular season is finally here . the campaign officially coming to a close this Sunday with all 30 teams playing . every new season comes with high expectations, with some teams meeting or exceeding those goals and others falling far from the original game plan .

title: Behold, the 'Zammoth': Utah Mammoth debut new fan attraction at Delta Center
content: the "Zammoth" will make its debut in their home game against the Edmonton Oilers on Tuesday night . it can seat up to eight fans and will roll through the Delta Center ice during the pregame and intermissions . the two-decade-old, decommissioned ice-resurfacing machine can no longer clean the ice .

title: Make-or-break questions the USWNT must answer before next year's World Cup
content: the 2027 women's world cup is just over a year away . the team is about to play the same team three times in a week . defender Tierna Davidson is back with the team for the first time in 17 months after her maternity leave .

title: Sam Darnold marries fiancée Katie Hoofnagle, with Josh Allen, Christian McCaffrey on hand
content: the couple got married in front of a star-studded guest list . there were 227 guests at the wedding, which implemented a phone-free policy . the couple went public with their relationship in 2023 .

title: 'Don't move on, just move forward': How hockey helped Michigan's Michael Hage overcome tragedy
content: the path to a national title runs through the site of the Frozen Four . it was in Las Vegas where one of the most significant moments of Hage's hockey career occurred . the 19-year-old center doesn't remember everything about his draft night at the Sphere in June 2024 .

title: 'I'm going to put it in my house in a safe': How the Masters lawn gnome became so popular that it might be discontinued
content: Ryan Carey is considered the world's most accomplished golf memorabilia expert . the gnome has been a kitschy decorative item for centuries . it's the only item available on site that is limited to one purchase per patron .
